title: Thyme Nourish Poaching
description: An earthy and gooey Algerian dish featuring fresh thyme, poached in a comforting broth that's both kosher-friendly and easy to prepare.

ingredients.name: Bone-In Chicken Breast
ingredients.amount: 3 bone-in chicken breasts, cut into 2 pieces each

instructions: Combine water, lemon juice, and salt in a large pot. Bring to a boil.
Add thyme sprigs, chicken pieces, garlic, and onion to the boiling liquid. Reduce heat to low and simmer gently for about 20 minutes.
Check if any bones are still hard by pricking with a fork; they should yield easily once cooked through.
Remove from heat and let sit for an additional 5-10 minutes before serving.
